ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the client belongs to */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the client */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the client */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the client was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the client's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quarterly_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client who uploaded the data */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data belongs to */,
  "qtr1" INTEGER /* Qtr1 data value */,
  "qtr2" INTEGER /* Qtr2 data value */,
  "qtr3" INTEGER /* Qtr3 data value */,
  "qtr4" INTEGER /* Qtr4 data value */,
  "qtr1_date" TEXT /* Specific date for Qtr1 data */,
  "qtr2_date" TEXT /* Specific date for Qtr2 data */,
  "qtr3_date" TEXT /* Specific date for Qtr3 data */,
  "qtr4_date" TEXT /* Specific date for Qtr4 data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was uploaded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quarterly_data_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rule */,
  "rule_name" TEXT /* Name of the rule */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Description of the rule */,
  "rule_script" TEXT /* Script or function that implements the validation rule */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the rule was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the rule was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the report belongs to */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., Qtr1-Qtr4, Year-over-Year) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_data" (
  "report_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report data entry */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report the data belongs to */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quarterly data the report is based on */,
  "qtr1" INTEGER /* Qtr1 data value */,
  "qtr2" INTEGER /* Qtr2 data value */,
  "qtr3" INTEGER /* Qtr3 data value */,
  "qtr4" INTEGER /* Qtr4 data value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report data was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES quarterly_data ("data_id")
)
